title: Space Temperature Control
full_text:
8.4.3.7 Space Temperature Control
Space Temperature Control
1) Where the proposed building's specifications do not specify the throttling ranges
of the heating and cooling equipment, the energy model shall use a range of ±1°C.

sentences.text: Where the proposed building's specifications do not specify the throttling ranges of the heating and cooling equipment, the energy model shall use a range of ±1°C.
